title: A Memorandum of Understanding Signed to Advance the Development of a Green Hydrogen Production Facility in LiepÄja
content:
On December 1, a Memorandum of Understanding was signed between hydrogen producer CIS Liepaja Ltd. and wind energy developer Vindr Latvia Ltd. to advance a major green hydrogen initiative in LiepÄja, Latvia. The agreement, witnessed by the Minister for Climate and Energy and Norwegian officials, aims to secure a long-term renewable energy supply via the national grid for a planned production facility in the LiepÄja Special Economic Zone.

CIS Liepaja plans to invest over â‚¬550 million to construct one of Northern Europeâ€™s largest green hydrogen plants by 2030. The facility is expected to produce approximately 150,000 tons annually, with significant exports targeting Germany and the EU. Vindr Latvia will support this operation by supplying 150 MW of clean electricity from its developing 900 MW portfolio. This collaboration strengthens Latviaâ€™s energy independence, fosters economic growth, and solidifies the strategic partnership between Latvian and Norwegian industries.
author: Analysts Account
